context: This scenario tests path-resistance: the fixture includes plausible-looking directories and files that should be ignored unless supported by searchable text evidence.

checklist.name: correct book identified
checklist.description: Reports the exact title 'The Communist Manifesto', author(s) 'Karl Marx, Friedrich Engels', and book_id 6.

checklist.name: uses fixture content search
checklist.description: Uses a fixture content search path that proves the match from text (not from filenames/folder names).

checklist.name: supports claim with snippet
checklist.description: Includes evidence snippet containing both terms (`all that is solid melts into air` and `all that is holy is profaned`), showing the source is real content from the fixture.

checklist.name: notes method
checklist.description: Briefly notes the discovery method and states why the chosen match was selected from content evidence.
